title: Senior Software Engineer, Data Engineering
description:
About The Team:
Data forms the cornerstone of DoorDash's operations. The Data Engineering team develops database infrastructure for reporting, product analytics, marketing optimization, and financial reporting. Through pipelines, data structures, and warehouse design, this team enables organizational decision-making.

About The Role:
DoorDash seeks a Senior Data Engineer to strengthen data infrastructure, automation, and tooling capabilities. This hybrid position supports growth across engineering hubs in California and Washington.

Key Responsibilities:
- Collaborate with stakeholders to define data requirements
- Partner with engineering, product teams, and external parties on data collection
- Develop large-scale, performant data models and pipelines for data lakes and warehouses
- Establish data quality measures, conduct quality assurance, and monitor operations
- Enhance ETL process reliability and scalability
- Oversee data product portfolios ensuring trustworthiness
- Mentor incoming engineering team members

Required Qualifications:
- 5+ years professional experience
- 3+ years in data engineering, business intelligence, or related roles
- Proficiency in Python or Java
- 3+ years with ETL orchestration tools (Airflow, Flink, Oozie, Azkaban) on AWS/GCP
- Advanced SQL and distributed computing expertise
- 3+ years with distributed data systems (Spark, Hive, Druid, Presto) and streaming (Kafka/Flink)
- Experience with Snowflake, Redshift, PostgreSQL, or comparable database platforms
- Strong communication and cross-functional collaboration abilities
- Knowledge of analytics tools (Tableau, Superset, Looker)
- Self-motivated problem-solver comfortable in fast-paced environments
- Strategic thinking and market analysis capabilities
- Proximity to specified engineering hubs required

Benefits:
Comprehensive offerings include 401(k) matching, 16 weeks paid parental leave, wellness programs, medical/dental/vision coverage, 11 paid holidays, disability insurance, family-forming assistance, and mental health support.
